headline: BofA’s Top Strategist Says Ditch the Index and Buy These ‘Boring’ Stocks Instead
summary: Savita Subramanian, Bank of America Securities’ head of US equity and quantitative strategy, took to CNBC this week with a simple message. Corporate earnings are “gangbusters”, and the trade you actually want is the one no one is memeing about. Her pitch is that cyclicals are cheap, capex is accelerating, and the boring stuff has ... BofA’s Top Strategist Says Ditch the Index and Buy These ‘Boring’ Stocks Instead
